revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Fukuōji-jinja]][[ja:福王子神社]] {{Expand Japanese|福王子神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Fukuōji Shrine | native_name = 福王子神社 | image = 福王子神社-02.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Fukuōji Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.029028|135.709111}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Empress Dowager Hanshi|lt=Empress Dowager Hanshi|ja|班子女王|zh|班子女王|qid=Q11573356|1=Empress Dowager Hanshi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Fukuōji Shrine'''|福王子神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q580186|ltq=Q580186|qid=Q580186|1=Ukyō-ku, Kyoto}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.029028|135.709111}} == image (P18) == * 福王子神社-02.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Empress Dowager Hanshi|lt=Empress Dowager Hanshi|ja|班子女王|zh|班子女王|qid=Q11573356|1=Empress Dowager Hanshi}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * ふくおうじじんじゃ == VIAF cluster ID (P214) == * 258514249 == location (P276) == * {{ill|Utano|lt=Utano|ja|宇多野|qid=Q65260610|1=Utano}} == TripAdvisor ID (P3134) == * 13277041 == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 2130005002002 == NDL Authority ID (P349) == * 00866702 == Commons category (P373) == * Fukuōji-jinja == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135038767|ltq=Q135038767|qid=Q135038767|1=Fukakahano Shrine}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府京都市右京区宇多野福王子町52', 'language': 'ja'} == Japan Search name ID (P6698) == * 福王子神社 == image of entrance (P9721) == * 福王子神社-01.jpg {{commons category|Category:Fukuōji-jinja}} [[JA:福王子神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11594015}} == Japanese content == {{?? |?? = Fuku?ji Shrine |?? = [[????:?????-01.jpg|270px]]
Torii and worship hall |??? = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|qid=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kyoto|Q34600|qid=Q34600|1=Kyoto}}{{ill|lt=Uky?-ku|Q580186|qid=Q580186|1=Ukyō-ku, Kyoto}}{{ill|lt=Utano|Q65260610|qid=Q65260610|1=Utano}}{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Fuku?ji-ch?|1=UNKNOWN}}52 |?? = {{?????2????|35|01|44.5|N|135|42|32.8|E|region:JP-26_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=?????}} |?? = {{ill|lt=Empress Dowager Hanshi|Q11573356|qid=Q11573356|lt=Empress Hanshi|1=Empress Dowager Hanshi}} |?? = former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}?{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} |?? = Heian period, revived in {{ill|lt=1644|Q6920|qid=Q6920|1=1644}} ({{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|qid=Q1192913|1=Kan'ei}} 21) |?? = one-bay {{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|qid=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |?? = Fukossan |?? = third Sunday of October |?? = |?? = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto city|label=?????|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Fuku?ji Shrine''' (?????????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Utano|Q65260610|qid=Q65260610|1=Utano}}{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Fuku?ji-ch?|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|lt=Uky?-ku|Q580186|qid=Q580186|1=Ukyō-ku, Kyoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto|Q34600|qid=Q34600|1=Kyoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|qid=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. It enshrines {{ill|lt=Empress Dowager Hanshi|Q11573356|qid=Q11573356|lt=Empress Hanshi|1=Empress Dowager Hanshi}}, consort of {{ill|lt=Emperor K?k?|Q440518|qid=Q440518|1=Emperor Kōkō}} and mother of {{ill|lt=Emperor Uda|Q349267|qid=Q349267|1=Emperor Uda}}. Since Emperor Uda founded {{ill|lt=Ninna-ji|Q1202871|qid=Q1202871|1=Ninna-ji}}, this shrine is regarded as the temple's {{ill|lt=guardian deity|Q97479976|qid=Q97479976|1=Chinjugami}}. === History === According to tradition, its predecessor was {{ill|lt=Fukagawa Shrine|Q11560019|qid=Q11560019|1=Fukagawa Shrine}}, whose name appears in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}, but it burned in the {{ill|lt=?nin War|Q385676|qid=Q385676|1=Ōnin War}} (1468). Later, in Kan'ei 21 ({{ill|lt=1644|Q6920|qid=Q6920|1=1644}}), {{ill|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu|Q314481|qid=Q314481|1=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Imperial Prince Kakushin|1=UNKNOWN}} rebuilt the shrine buildings. Since Empress Hanshi's mausoleum was nearby, they enshrined the empress, and it became Fuku?ji Shrine. The shrine name is also said to derive from the fact that Empress Hanshi bore many imperial princes and princessesKyoto City Tourism and Culture Information System - Fuku?ji Shrine. === Precinct shrine === As a subordinate shrine, F?k?jin Shrine (Matsuo Daimy?jin), enshrining {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=F?k?jin|1=UNKNOWN}}, is said to have been established in the {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|qid=Q193292|1=Heian period}} for safe transport. At that time, ice was customarily offered from {{ill|lt=himuro|Q253893|qid=Q253893|1=Ice house (building)}} in {{ill|lt=Rakuhoku|Q11555800|qid=Q11555800|1=Rakuhoku}} to the imperial court, and workers sometimes died during transport. === Cultural properties === === Important Cultural Property === [[??:Fukuoji-jinja_20071107_001.jpg|thumb|Main hall (left rear)]] [[????:?????-02.jpg|thumb|Worship hall]] The Kan'ei revival shrine complex (two buildings and one torii) is designated a national {{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|qid=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}. Designated June 2, 1973. * Main hall ({{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|qid=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}}, copper roof). Attached: one munafuda, two stone lanterns. * Worship hall ({{ill|lt=irimoya-zukuri|Q855025|qid=Q855025|1=East Asian hip-and-gable roof}}, copper roof) * Torii (stone, my?jin torii) === Festivals === * New Year's Day festival (January 1) * Nanakusa-gayu (January 7) * {{ill|lt=Setsubun|Q746798|qid=Q746798|1=Setsubun}} festival (February 3) * {{ill|lt=Nagoshi no ?harae|Q11261910|qid=Q11261910|lt=summer purification|1=Ōharae-shiki}} (June 30) * Autumn grand festival (around October 18) * Ohitaki festival (November 18) * {{ill|lt=?harae|Q11261910|qid=Q11261910|1=Ōharae-shiki}} (December 31) === Access === * {{ill|lt=Kyoto City Bus|Q4858667|qid=Q4858667|1=Kyoto City Bus}}: get off at "Fuku?ji" stop * {{ill|lt=Keifuku Kitano Line|Q10883224|qid=Q10883224|1=Kitano Line}}: about 3 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Utano Station|Q11449247|qid=Q11449247|1=Utano Station}} === Notes === {{?????}} {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://kanko.city.kyoto.lg.jp/detail.php?InforKindCode=1&ManageCode=1000412 Kyoto City Tourism Navi] - Fuku?ji Shrine {{?? ?}} {{shinto-stub}} {{Buddhism-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=???}} {{Normdaten}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Fukuōji Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Fukuōji Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto]] [[Category:Son-sha in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines of Jinja Honkyō]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Cultural heritage monuments in Japan]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties in Kyoto City]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Ukyo-ku, Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Ukyo-ku, Kyoto]] [[Category:仁和寺]] [[Category:宇多野]][[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto]] [[Category:Chinjusha]]
